mapper.select: select id from subscribers where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into subscribers (email, unsubscribe_token, active) values (#{email}, #{unsubscribeToken}, true)
mapper.select: select id from subscribers where unsubscribe_token = #{token} and deleted_at is null
select count(*) from subscribers where deleted_at is null
select id, email, active, created_at, updated_at from subscribers where deleted_at is null order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select id, email, unsubscribe_token, active, created_at, updated_at from subscribers where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
